programme.title: Sukob
programme.desc: A Filipino couple working overseas return to their hometown to get married. But a deadly curse follows the couple, based on the superstition that marriage should not take place within a year of the death of an immediate relative.

programme.title: Kimmy Dora and the Temple of Kiyeme
programme.desc: Twin sisters Kimmy and Dora accept proposals from their boyfriends and strange things begin to happen to the men and their father.

programme.title: Beauty in a Bottle
programme.desc: Three women struggle to cope with their insecurities and body image as they get caught up in the craze over a new beauty product.

programme.title: Fallback
programme.desc: A young teen who is lured by a world of fast money and glamour is trapped by the dark side of gangs and drugs.

programme.title: Warden
programme.desc: A young man with superpowers emerges, astonishing the city as he tackles crime and corruption. But some sense a tyrant's rise.

programme.title: Ang tange kong pag-Ibig
programme.desc: A woman hires an investigator to tail her cheating husband. However, the detective soon falls in love with his target's lover, a florist who inadvertently becomes the target of a crime syndicate.

programme.title: Ang Pinakamahabang Baba sa Balat ng Lupa
Pempe ni Sara at Pen
programme.desc: Sara escapes from her mother's forced marriage and in her time of need, Pempe the taxi driver helps her.

programme.title: A Moment in Time
programme.desc: A high-spirited guy working as a waiter and painter meets a shy violinist from a rich family, and love blossoms -- until a dark secret is revealed.

programme.title: Nag-Iisang Bituin
programme.desc: Miggy, a mentally challenged boy, struggles to cope with his surroundings. However, things change after his brother and a psychiatrist step up to help him.

programme.title: Hostage
programme.desc: Ken gains wealth as he helps his close friends invest in a once-in-a-lifetime business opportunity.

programme.title: Bridal Shower
programme.desc: Three employees (Dina Bonnevie, Cherrie Pie Picache, Francine Prieto) at an advertising agency confront sex, love and marriage.

programme.title: Bulong
programme.desc: A man makes a wish that a certain girl will fall in love with him, but he gets more than he bargained for when all the women he meets get very affectionate.

programme.title: Asboobs Asal Bobo
programme.desc: Men from different backgrounds who have experienced adversities in life join the military to make something of themselves.

programme.title: Aagos Ang Dugo
programme.desc: A young boy's kidnapping goes awry when the greedy criminals engage in a blood fight among themselves for the hefty ransom.

programme.title: Boy! Gising!
programme.desc: A street boy who lives with his hooligan friends in a discarded bus has many adventures due to the mischief in which he engages. His life changes when gangsters want to use him as a sumo wrestler.

programme.title: Home Sic Home
programme.desc: Melanie hates Berto after a series of disastrous encounters until he saves her from thugs in the United States. Berto agrees to marry Melanie so she can stay in the country, but they must stay together all the time to fool authorities.

programme.title: Galvez: Hanggang sa dulo ng mundo hahanapin kita
programme.desc: Marvin vows to take revenge on the lawyer who mistakenly sentenced him to life imprisonment for the rape and murder of a woman.

programme.title: Sgt. Patalinhug
programme.desc: A police officer, despite the dangers of his profession and low pay, wholeheartedly risks his life and gives his all to succeed in his missions.

programme.title: Yesterday, Today and Tomorrow
programme.desc: A journalist (Richard Thomas) comes face to face with his future when he returns to Long Island to confront his past.

programme.title: To Love Some Buddy
programme.desc: Two friends grow close to each other after a reunion and fall in love. However, their relationship is put to the test by new expectations and difficulties.

programme.title: Top Chef S17
programme.desc: With only six chefs remaining, the challenges get even more difficult, when pastry super-chef Sherry Yard awaits the All Stars for a dreaded dessert Quickfire, made even more impossible when chefs must endure a blindfolded taste test to pick their ingredients. Then Michelin-starred Chefs/Restaurateurs Niki and Carole Lidi-Nakayama demonstrate a traditional Japanese Kaiseki meal, the ultimate in simplicity, restraint and precision. The chefs must make this formidable dinner for not just these Kaiseki masters, but in celebration of the Tokyo games with Olympic medalists Diana Taurasi, Rai Benjamin, Nastia Liukin, Ibtihaj Muhammad, Christian Coleman, Kerri Walsh Jennings and NBC Olympic Primetime Host Mike Tirico. The gold medal meal takes place at the iconic Los Angeles Coliseum with Padma, Tom, Nilou Motamed and Niki & Carole Lidi-Nakayama at the judges table.

programme.title: Ben 10 S2
programme.desc: When a cavity forces Ben to consult a dentist, his day gets worse when the mean magician Hex uses a dreamcatcher to bring Ben's fears to life and transports them both to a nightmarish dreamscape.

programme.title: Ben 10 S2
programme.desc: When the Rustbucket must have a tune-up in the same town as Zombozo's latest campaign trail stop, Ben discovers the clown is using his speeches to hypnotise and rob the town.

programme.title: Ben 10 S2
programme.desc: As the Tennysons dig up dinosaur fossils in the Badlands, Ben is unaware that Vilgax and Dr. Amino have teamed up to steal alien DNA from the Omnitrix. Vilgax then double-crosses his fellow villain.

programme.title: Ben 10 S2
programme.desc: During a live feed of the new transcontinental bullet train, La Grange enters the picture to outrace the train, but Ben joins in on the fun and will stop at nothing to come out on top!

programme.title: Bel-Air S2

programme.title: Superman Returns

programme.title: Top Chef S17
programme.desc: Tom makes his final decision from Last Chance Kitchen on who should return to the competition. Then the chefs take off in a Quickfire with Padma and Jonathan Waxman making a two-course Business-Class dish for an airline. For their final challenge in Los Angeles before jetting off to Italy for the finale, the chefs go to Michael’s Santa Monica, where they meet Chef and Restaurateur Michael McCarty, the legendary pioneer of California Cuisine. With only five chefs moving onto the finals, the chefs will have to reimagine one of Michael’s iconic dishes from across the years and serve it to a table of celebrated alumni of Michael’s kitchen, including Roy Yamaguchi, Jonathan Waxman, Sang Yoon, Mark Peel and Brooke Williamson.

programme.title: The Humboldt Current
programme.desc: In Chile's Torres del Paine melt from snow-covered mountains feeds finger-like fjords as they reach out to the sea to join the current lowering its salinity. Rivers estuaries and wetlands are home to many wading birds and the countless inlets and bays are magnets for rare dolphins and orcas.

programme.title: The Humboldt Current
programme.desc: The Humboldt Current is slower than most ocean currents but it’s the most dynamic in the world because it travels for such a long distance. Upwelling from the deepest trenches brings nutrients to the surface allowing phytoplankton to bloom laying the foundation for an intricate marine food chain

programme.title: The Humboldt Current
programme.desc: The current is followed by a unique population of Chilean blue whales and is the last refuge for other extremely rare marine mammals. From the chill of its deepest depths to the wind on its highest cliffs the current creates unusual habitats and is a study in survival.

programme.title: Destination Flavour: Japan
programme.desc: Adam Liaw discovers a host of delights in Japan. On the wintry northern island of Hokkaido, he samples sea urchin, pond smelt and boutique cheesecake.

programme.title: Destination Flavour: Japan
programme.desc: Adam goes to sea with the fishermen who caught the so-called `million-dollar tuna'. He also meets a soy sauce maker who saved his staff from the 2011 tsunami.

programme.title: Destination Flavour: Japan
programme.desc: Adam Liaw continues his culinary tour of Japan, preparing fresh sushi and taking a trip to his wife's hometown to indulge in a little home cooking.

programme.title: Destination Flavour: Japan
programme.desc: Adam Liaw continues his culinary pilgrimage in Japan, devouring some of the finest miso, Nagoya chicken and Wagyu beef, and meeting a 74-year-old abalone diver.

programme.title: Destination Flavour: Japan
programme.desc: In the vast urban sprawl of Tokyo, Adam Liaw explores a food culture that not only sustains the `salaryman' workers in style but retains culinary traditions.

programme.title: Destination Flavour: Japan
programme.desc: Adam Liaw checks out the restaurants of food-crazy Tokyo and taste's some interesting dishes including Yakitori made from the reproductive organs of chickens.

programme.title: Artist to Icon
programme.desc: Features interviews with Julia Roberts’ Pretty Woman costume designer Marilyn Vance, Michael Collins producer Stephen Woolley, The Hollywood Reporter’s Scott Feinberg, plus many more.

programme.title: Artist to Icon
programme.desc: Features interviews with Tom Hanks’ Captain Phillips producer Dana Brunetti, A League Of Their Own producer Elliot Abbott, friend and actor George Maguire, plus many more.

programme.title: Artist to Icon
programme.desc: Features interviews with Whitney Houston’s The Bodyguard director Mick Jackson, musician Wayne Linsey, The Preacher’s Wife producer Elliot Abbott, plus many more.

programme.title: Air Warriors S10
programme.desc: From night stalker missions to rescue operations, see how the Little Bird helicopter earned its place among the big boys.

programme.title: Air Warriors S10
programme.desc: Watch the massive military transport aircraft C-5 Galaxy come up big time and again over its five decades of service

programme.title: Destination Flavour: Singapore
programme.desc: Adam Liaw continues his search for seafood inspiration by heading to the famous Newton Food Centre. He gives a masterclass on how to line up a seafood feast like no other.

programme.title: Destination Flavour: Singapore
programme.desc: Adam Liaw goes in search of Singapore's best vegetable dishes, kicking off with a traditional breakfast at Singapore Zoo, including kaya toast with half-cooked eggs and coffee.

programme.title: Destination Flavour: Singapore
programme.desc: In his quest to find the best ingredients for his banquet dinner, Adam Liaw visits a colourful fruit and veg market in Geylang and a Michelin-starred restaurant.

programme.title: Destination Flavour: Singapore
programme.desc: In between some cocktail-tasting pit stops, Adam Liaw discovers some of the finest desserts in Singapore, from homemade Peranakan sweet treats to a sophisticated dessert bar.

programme.title: Destination Flavour: Singapore
programme.desc: Adam Liaw gathers what he has learned over the past few weeks to serve up an impressive five-course banquet dinner to some distinguished guests, including his mother.

programme.title: Destination Flavour: Singapore
programme.desc: Adam Liaw catches up with a cousin from his father's side of the family to learn how he has been making Hainanese chicken rice for over 30 years.

programme.title: Expedition From Hell: The Lost Tapes (S1)
programme.desc: A near-deadly case of dengue fever almost stops Mickey before he's arrested at gunpoint and imprisoned in Brazil. Missing footage leads to questions.

programme.title: Bering Sea Gold (S9)
programme.desc: Winter has come -- along with the thinnest, most unpredictable ice in decades. After three years, Shawn returns to diving under the ice in pursuit of the Tomcod claim.

programme.title: Sharktopia
programme.desc: In this special, Mark teams up with cinematographer and shark expert Kina Scollay to hunt for a brand new walking shark species and hunt for schooling hammerheads.

programme.title: Wheeler Dealers World Tour (S2)
programme.desc: Mike and Elvis only have a shoestring budget to fix up a Hillman Imp. With a journalist lined up to review the finished car, the heat is on.

programme.title: Wheeler Dealers (Season 18b) (S18)
programme.desc: Mike and Elvis have one of their toughest challenges yet: can they make an Audi RS6 estate car faster than a sportscar? Elvis has doubts after a hazardous test drive.

programme.title: Ant Anstead: Born Mechanic (S2)
programme.desc: Ant haggles with a 91-year-old Italian Nonna to get a 1970 Fiat 500, but it's full of faults. Plus, Ant tackles the farmhouse floor as costs soar.

programme.title: Wheeler Dealers (S18)
programme.desc: Mike and Elvis tackle a classic Toyota Landcruiser. Mike takes a gamble and imports an original 70s one from Japan, not knowing what state it will arrive in.

programme.title: Kindig Customs (S9)
programme.desc: Dave and the guys do a huge job on a Hummer! They convert it from two-wheel to four-wheel drive, swap the engine, redo the interior and give it a fresh paint job.

programme.title: Wild & Weird America (S1)
programme.desc: There’s plenty of malfunctions in these clips of man vs. machine. From power tools to semi-trucks, each moment is a wild adventure caught on camera.

programme.title: Wild & Weird America (S1)
programme.desc: It’s time to look upwards with incredible airborne moments caught on camera. From skydiving mishaps to a thieving eagle, these clips defy gravity!

programme.title: Filthy Fortunes (S1)
programme.desc: Matt hunts for rare liquor, hand-rolled cigars and vintage drums in two California hoards. A baseball pennant misprint could be a huge score.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown (S10)
programme.desc: Josh hunts for the truth about the Third Reich's Amerikabomber, a warplane designed to obliterate New York City.

programme.title: High Speed Chase (S2)
programme.desc: In Camden, Georgia, a driver leads deputies on a 150-mph chase before a high-speed PIT brings the pursuit to a shocking, fiery end.

programme.title: Truck Dynasty (S1)
programme.desc: A returning customer from TX wants a Ford Bronco converted into a boat-towing, off-roading-friendly pickup. Jerry Jr. orders in some neon green paint.

programme.title: Ant Anstead: Born Mechanic (S2)
programme.desc: Ant revamps a 1972 beach buggy giving it a radical twist, but has he gone too far? And the scale of the farmhouse renovation starts to hit Ant.

programme.title: Street Outlaws: No Prep Kings: The Great Eight_S2 (S2)
programme.desc: The top eight No Prep drivers kick off the Great 8 Individual Championships in Virginia, racing to win $100,000.

programme.desc: Car dealer Mike Brewer is back in the UK! Along with ace mechanic Marc ‘Elvis’ Priestley, he’s on a mission to find and restore iconic cars to sell for a profit.

Find out what is like to live in France, get to know its regions, and feel the true taste of France.

programme.title: The Observers
programme.desc: The Observers on France 24 is a weekly show produced with photos, videos and personal accounts from Observers around the world. Top international current affairs are covered by using eyewitness accounts from Observers- people who are at the heart of an event. They send their photos and videos, which are verified and contextualized by France 24 team of professional journalists in Paris. The Observers are volunteers, and are not paid for their contributions.

programme.desc: In our fast-moving challenging world it is of fundamental importance to sort what's true from what's fake online. programme.title: Grade 2 Filipino
programme.desc: Matuto tungkol sa pangngalan, panghalip, salitang magkatugma, salitang naglalarawan, at pagbabaybay, pati na rin ang iba't ibang elemento ng kuwento at ang pag-uugnay ng sarili sa tekstong nabasa.

programme.title: Grade 2 Math
programme.desc: Study how to divide whole numbers up to 1000 including money and unit fractions. Learn more about straight and curved lines, flat and curved surfaces, and basic shapes and continuous patterns using two attributes.

programme.title: Grade 2 English
programme.desc: Discover what are word clines, synonyms, and antonyms. Identify major points and key themes in a story, and the difference between what is made-up and real in texts.

programme.title: Grade 2 Araling Panlipunan
programme.desc: Alamin ang kahalagahan ng mabuting paglilingkod ng mga namumuno sa pagsulong ng mga pangunahing hanapbuhay at pagtugon sa pangangailangan ng mga kasapi ng sariling komunidad.

programme.title: Grade 3 Filipino
programme.desc: Pag-aralan ang tambalang salita, pandiwa, pang-abay, at pang-ukol. Alamin kung paano magbigay ng sariling ideya, hinuha, pangunahin at sumusuportang kaisipan, tungkol sa kuwentong napakinggan.

programme.title: Grade 3 Math
programme.desc: Identify which fractions are proper and improper, similar and dissimilar and equivalent. Learn more about lines and symmetrical designs, continuous and repeating patterns, and mathematical sentences involving multiplication and division of whole numbers.

programme.title: Grade 3 English
programme.desc: Study what are homonyms, homographs, and hyponyms. Know more about the elements of a story, how to write it, and how to compare and contrast its information, alongside learning about words, phrases, and sentences with long vowels.

programme.title: Murder in Kermadec
programme.desc: A man is found dead at the foot of a cliff in a small quiet fishing village. Captain Breguet who wanted to leave the region will have to stay a little longer to solve this crime. She will find a mysterious man on her way and fight to protect her daughter.

programme.title: Suro
programme.desc: A young, vulnerable couple inherits a cork-harvesting farm in rural Catalonia. As newly fledged landowners, they dream of building a fair and sustainable life, only to find their ideals clash head-on with their dire need to make money.

programme.title: Hunting Season
programme.desc: Enersto, a hunting guide in Patagonia, is left to take care of his teenage son he hasn’t seen for years. An intense father-son relationship is played out amidst the hostility of nature.

programme.title: The Second
programme.desc: An author's success following the release of her celebrated erotic memoir is threatened when her best friend and muse reveals the truth behind the memoir's provenance, igniting an incendiary tale of sex, lies and betrayal.

programme.title: To Kill A Mongolian Horse
programme.desc: Saina, a herdsman by day and horseback performer by night, clings to his heritage on the wintry steppes of Inner Mongolia, as he’s forced to confront the crumbling of the world he once knew.

programme.title: Vera Dreams of the Sea
programme.desc: Vera, a devoted wife, mother, and grandmother, has her serene life turned upside down by her husband's sudden suicide. As greedy relatives and an underworld scheme threaten their family’s home, she must confront danger and take control of her own fate.

programme.title: Murders in Pont-Aven
programme.desc: The bodies of two gallery owners are found. These murders are reminiscent of the death of Suzanne, a painter, 20 years ago. The investigation is led by Marion, Suzanne's daughter, and by Antoine who was in charge of the investigations at the time.

programme.title: Here And There
programme.desc: Returning from the US, Pedro comes home to his family in Mexico. With the money he has made, he hopes to secure a better life with his family, mend his relationship with them, and hopes to achieve his lifelong dream of starting a band.

programme.title: Roise & Frank
programme.desc: Recently widowed Róise is struggling with her grief following her husband's passing. However, when a stray dog starts to follow her around, she starts to believe that it might be the reincarnation of her husband.

programme.title: The Deep
programme.desc: March 1984, a few miles off the south coast of Iceland, a fishing boat sank with all its men. One of the crew members miraculously survived. After six hours in the ocean, the exhausted man is washed ashore, only to find himself on a deadly lava field.

programme.title: One Last Supper
programme.desc: A spirit-seeing daughter must race against time to save her mother’s spirit from turning into a Hungry Ghost by retracing her mother’s past life.

programme.title: Murder in Kermadec
programme.desc: A man is found dead at the foot of a cliff in a small quiet fishing village. Captain Breguet who wanted to leave the region will have to stay a little longer to solve this crime. She will find a mysterious man on her way and fight to protect her daughter.

programme.title: From The Vine
programme.desc: A burnt-out executive experiences an ethical crisis and travels back to his hometown in rural Italy to recalibrate his moral compass.

programme.title: Murder in Mont St. Michel
programme.desc: A seemingly mystical murder takes Captain Sophie back to Mont-Saint-Michel, her childhood home and where her father is buried. She meets an exorcist priest and is annoyed by his silence but she's far from suspecting that a weighty secret unites them.

programme.title: The Uninvited Guest
programme.desc: In this suspense thriller, Felix, an architect, lets a stranger into his home to use his phone. When the man suddenly disappears inside the house, Felix finds himself in in a cat and mouse chase and his house becomes a maze.

programme.title: A Yard of Jackals
programme.desc: During the oppressive Chilean dictatorship, a lonely model maker takes refuge in the apparent peace of his neighborhood. However, his life is upended when mysterious neighbors arrive, unleashing a spiral of horror and violence that will leave deep scars.

programme.title: Almost Paradise S1 - EP 5
programme.desc: When a typhoon hits the Island, criminals and their hostages are trapped inside the police station. Alex must find a way to save his friends... as well as a sworn enemy - a US State Department bureaucrat there to "do a deal" with an arms dealer Alex had recently captured.

programme.title: Wheel Of Fortune S42 - EP 135
programme.desc: Ryan Seacrest takes over as the new host for the well-loved gameshow.

programme.title: Starstruck UK S2 - EP 3
programme.desc: Starstruck UK Series 2 features members of the public transforming into their favorite pop star lookalikes, with a new judge, Shania Twain, joining the panel alongside Adam Lambert, Beverley Knight, and Jason Manford. Hosted by Olly Murs.

programme.title: The Chase S16 - EP 33
programme.desc: Bradley Walsh and his criminally clever Chaser are back for yet another battle of the brains - can our contestants beat the Chaser, or will it be just another day at the office?

programme.title: Weather Gone Viral S8 - EP 7

programme.title: Vera Dreams of the Sea
programme.desc: Vera, a devoted wife, mother, and grandmother, has her serene life turned upside down by her husband's sudden suicide. As greedy relatives and an underworld scheme threaten their family’s home, she must confront danger and take control of her own fate.

programme.title: Here And There
programme.desc: Returning from the US, Pedro comes home to his family in Mexico. With the money he has made, he hopes to secure a better life with his family, mend his relationship with them, and hopes to achieve his lifelong dream of starting a band.

programme.title: The Deep
programme.desc: March 1984, a few miles off the south coast of Iceland, a fishing boat sank with all its men. One of the crew members miraculously survived. After six hours in the ocean, the exhausted man is washed ashore, only to find himself on a deadly lava field.

programme.title: From The Vine
programme.desc: A burnt-out executive experiences an ethical crisis and travels back to his hometown in rural Italy to recalibrate his moral compass.

programme.title: The Broken Glass Theory
programme.desc: Insurance claims investigator Claudio finds himself in a never-ending nightmare in a small town. For what seemed like a simple job, Claudio's task now involves racing against the clock to discover the identity of the worst serial arsonist he has yet seen.

programme.title: Murder in Mont St. Michel
programme.desc: A seemingly mystical murder takes Captain Sophie back to Mont-Saint-Michel, her childhood home and where her father is buried. She meets an exorcist priest and is annoyed by his silence but she's far from suspecting that a weighty secret unites them.

programme.title: Almost Entirely A Slight Disaster
programme.desc: In contemporary Istanbul, four youths in their twenties find themselves brought together by chance. Restless, disillusioned, and searching for direction, the four characters go face to face with the anxieties of their generation.

programme.title: The Uninvited Guest
programme.desc: In this suspense thriller, Felix, an architect, lets a stranger into his home to use his phone. When the man suddenly disappears inside the house, Felix finds himself in in a cat and mouse chase and his house becomes a maze.

programme.title: Bad Investigate
programme.desc: A corrupt cop sets out to hunt down a dangerous drug dealer who is seeking revenge for the death of his brother. Also trying to catch the same criminal is an FBI agent.

programme.title: A Yard of Jackals
programme.desc: During the oppressive Chilean dictatorship, a lonely model maker takes refuge in the apparent peace of his neighborhood. However, his life is upended when mysterious neighbors arrive, unleashing a spiral of horror and violence that will leave deep scars.

programme.title: Otar's Death
programme.desc: Keti and her son Nika find themselves in huge trouble when he hits an old man with his car. With the victim’s family threatening to press charges, Keti must find a way to raise a huge sum of money or Nika might go to prison.

programme.title: On The Fringe
programme.desc: The countdown of three characters – lawyer-activist Rafa, cashier Azucena and grandmother Teodora - with three interwoven stories who try to stay afloat and survive 24 key hours that may forever change the course of their lives.

programme.title: East Frisian: Oath
programme.desc: When retired detective Ubbo Heide receives a package containing a severed head, he recognizes it as belonging to the prime suspect of his daughter’s murder. Mystery surrounds the identity of the sender, whose name and address are both fictitious.

programme.title: Human Capital
programme.desc: Lake Como, Italy. A cyclist is hit off the road by a jeep in the night before Christmas Eve. What happened that night? How will this accident change the destiny of the rich Bernaschi family and the Rovelli family on the edge of bankruptcy?
